task: Write a Dockerfile at /tmp/clive/Dockerfile for a Python Flask app. Include: base image python:3.12-slim, copy requirements.txt, install deps, copy app code, expose port 8080, CMD to run app.py. Write the Dockerfile content to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Write a docker-compose.yml at /tmp/clive/ with: app service (build from Dockerfile, port 8080:8080), postgres service (postgres:16, port 5432, env vars for DB), and redis service (redis:7, port 6379). Write the YAML to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Write an nginx reverse proxy config at /tmp/clive/nginx.conf that: proxies / to localhost:8080, serves static files from /var/www/static, enables gzip, sets security headers (X-Frame-Options, CSP), and configures SSL with certificates at /etc/ssl/. Write to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Write a GitHub Actions CI workflow at /tmp/clive/.github/workflows/ci.yml for a Python project. Include: test on push/PR, matrix (Python 3.11, 3.12), install deps, run pytest, upload coverage. Write the YAML to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Write a comprehensive Makefile at /tmp/clive/Makefile with targets: install (pip install), test (pytest), lint (flake8), format (black), build (docker build), deploy (scp to ssh.ikangai.com), clean, and help (list all targets). Write the Makefile content to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Write a systemd service file at /tmp/clive/clive.service for running clive as a daemon. Include: description, user, working directory, exec start command, restart on failure, environment file, and logging to journal. Write to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Write a Terraform config at /tmp/clive/main.tf for a basic AWS setup: VPC, subnet, security group (allow 22, 80, 443), and an EC2 instance (t3.medium, Ubuntu). Write the .tf content to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Write an Ansible playbook at /tmp/clive/setup.yml that provisions a server: install packages (nginx, python3, git), create a deploy user, set up SSH keys, configure firewall (ufw allow 22,80,443), and deploy the app from git. Write the YAML to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Write Kubernetes manifests at /tmp/clive/k8s/: deployment.yaml (3 replicas, resource limits, health checks), service.yaml (ClusterIP port 80), and configmap.yaml (app config). Write combined content to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Write a docker-compose.yml for a monitoring stack at /tmp/clive/monitoring/: Prometheus (port 9090, with a scrape config for the app), Grafana (port 3000), and AlertManager (port 9093). Include a basic prometheus.yml config. Write to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Write a script at /tmp/clive/envman.sh that manages multiple environments (dev, staging, prod). It should: switch between .env files, validate required env vars exist, diff two environments, and generate a .env.example with no secret values. Test all features. Write to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Write a git workflow helper script at /tmp/clive/gitflow.sh with subcommands: 'feature <name>' (create feature branch), 'hotfix <name>' (create from main), 'release <version>' (create release branch, update version), 'status' (show branch info). Test in a test repo. Write results to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: mkdir -p /tmp/clive/test_repo && cd /tmp/clive/test_repo && git init && echo 'v1.0.0' > VERSION && git add -A && git commit -m 'initial' 2>/dev/null

task: Write a simple load testing script at /tmp/clive/loadtest.sh that sends N concurrent requests to a URL using curl and background jobs. Measure: total time, requests per second, success rate. Test with 20 requests to https://httpbin.org/get. Write results to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Write a secrets management script at /tmp/clive/secrets.sh that stores secrets encrypted (using openssl enc). Subcommands: 'set <name> <value>' (encrypt and store), 'get <name>' (decrypt and display), 'list' (show secret names without values), 'rotate <name>' (re-encrypt with new key). Test with a DB password. Write to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Write an incident response runbook script at /tmp/clive/runbook.sh that automates common checks: service health (curl endpoints), disk space, memory, recent error logs, database connectivity. Output a structured incident report. Test it. Write to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
